title: Why Bitcoin-Backed Loans Don't Trigger Capital Gains — And Why That's Your Killer Feature
excerpt: Your members are holding billions in unrealized crypto gains. The reason they haven't come to you for liquidity isn't distrust — it's taxes. Here's the strategic case for CU lending officers.

title: Why We Build
excerpt: We didn't set out to disrupt credit unions. We set out to make sure they don't get left behind.

title: Your Data Should Work For You. Not Around You.
excerpt: We've built something we believe is a first in credit union fintech. Here's what Fully Homomorphic Encryption means for the credit union and the member — no computer science degree required.

title: When Nasdaq Calls Crypto Infrastructure "Ready," It's Time to Pay Attention
excerpt: Nasdaq and Kraken just announced a partnership to tokenize equities on blockchain rails. Here's what it means for credit unions building digital asset infrastructure.

excerpt: The tokenized asset market crossed $33 billion in 2025. BlackRock and JP Morgan are already in. But the credit union ecosystem has been left out.

title: Citi Moves Into Bitcoin. Who Gets Left Out?
excerpt: When the world's largest banks move into digital assets, the gap between institutional and community finance widens fast. Here's how credit unions close it.
